```{=html}
<link rel="icon" href="/apps/tunes/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon">
	<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/shared/abcjs-audio.css">
	
	<style>
		main {
			max-width: 770px;
			margin: 0 auto;
		}
		.feedback {
			display: none;
		}
		.highlight {
			fill: #0057b7;
		}
		.abcjs-cursor {
			stroke: red;
			stroke-width: 4;
		}
		.abcjs-tempo-wrapper {
			margin-left: 9px;
		}
		.click-explanation {
			color: #ffd700;
			font-style: italic;
		}
		.beat {
			display: none;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		.label {
			color: #888888;
		}
		.midi {
			margin-top: -20px;
			margin-left: 5px;
		}
		.seek-controls {
			margin-top: 5px;
		}
		.seek-controls.disabled {
			background-color: #cccccc;
			opacity: 0.5;
		}
		.warp, .seek, .download {
			display: none;
		}
		textarea, .seek-controls, .abcjs-download-midi, .next, .clicked-info {
			display: none;
		}
		.tuneButtons, input {
			display: inline-block;
			margin: 5px 2vw;
		}
		input {
			width: 40px;
		}
		div.inflow {
			position: relative;
			margin: 0 15%;
		}
		div.fixed {
			position: fixed;
			bottom: 3vh;
			left: 10vw;
			right: 10vw;
		}
		.options {
			display: flex;
			text-align: center;
			align-items: center;
			justify-content: center;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
		}
		.buddy {
			display: inline-block;
			margin-bottom: 6px;
		}
		.buddy > label {
			margin-left: 15px;
		}
		.checkbox {
			margin-left: -13px;
		}
		.number-input-label {
			margin-right: -16px;
		}
		.midi-transpose {
			display: none;
		}
	</style>
	<script>
		const midiInstruments = [
			"acoustic_grand_piano", "bright_acoustic_piano", "electric_grand_piano",
			"honkytonk_piano", "electric_piano_1", "electric_piano_2", "harpsichord",
			"clavinet", "celesta", "glockenspiel", "music_box", "vibraphone", "marimba",
			"xylophone", "tubular_bells", "dulcimer", "drawbar_organ", "percussive_organ",
			"rock_organ", "church_organ", "reed_organ", "accordion", "harmonica",
			"tango_accordion", "acoustic_guitar_nylon", "acoustic_guitar_steel",
			"electric_guitar_jazz", "electric_guitar_clean", "electric_guitar_muted",
			"overdriven_guitar", "distortion_guitar", "guitar_harmonics", "acoustic_bass",
			"electric_bass_finger", "electric_bass_pick", "fretless_bass", "slap_bass_1",
			"slap_bass_2", "synth_bass_1", "synth_bass_2", "violin", "viola", "cello",
			"contrabass", "tremolo_strings", "pizzicato_strings", "orchestral_harp",
			"timpani", "string_ensemble_1", "string_ensemble_2", "synth_strings_1",
			"synth_strings_2", "choir_aahs", "voice_oohs", "synth_choir", "orchestra_hit",
			"trumpet", "trombone", "tuba", "muted_trumpet", "french_horn", "brass_section",
			"synth_brass_1", "synth_brass_2", "soprano_sax", "alto_sax", "tenor_sax",
			"baritone_sax", "oboe", "english_horn", "bassoon", "clarinet", "piccolo",
			"flute", "recorder", "pan_flute", "blown_bottle", "shakuhachi", "whistle",
			"ocarina", "lead_1_square", "lead_2_sawtooth", "lead_3_calliope", "lead_4_chiff",
			"lead_5_charang", "lead_6_voice", "lead_7_fifths", "lead_8_bass__lead",
			"pad_1_new_age", "pad_2_warm", "pad_3_polysynth", "pad_4_choir", "pad_5_bowed",
			"pad_6_metallic", "pad_7_halo", "pad_8_sweep", "fx_1_rain", "fx_2_soundtrack",
			"fx_3_crystal", "fx_4_atmosphere", "fx_5_brightness", "fx_6_goblins",
			"fx_7_echoes", "fx_8_scifi", "sitar", "banjo", "shamisen", "koto", "kalimba",
			"bagpipe", "fiddle", "shanai", "tinkle_bell", "agogo", "steel_drums", "woodblock"
		];

		const instrumentTranspositions = {
			"Piano": 0, "Flute": 12, "Clarinet": 2, "Alto Sax": 9,
			"Trumpet": 2, "Trombone": 0, "Tuba": -12, "Percussion": 0
		};

		let abc = [];
		let currentTune = 0;
		let synthControl;

		function showCursor() {
			const cursor = document.getElementById("abcjs-cursor");
			if (cursor) cursor.style.display = document.getElementById("show-cursor").checked ? "block" : "none";
		}

		function showOptions() {
			document.getElementById("the-bottom").style.display =
				document.getElementById("show-options").checked ? "block" : "none";
		}

		function clefHandler() {
			const inst = document.getElementById("inst-select").value;
			switch (inst) {
				case "Flute": case "Clarinet": case "Alto Sax": case "Trumpet":
					checkChanger("bass-clef", false);
					disabler("bass-clef", true);
					break;
				case "Trombone": case "Tuba":
					checkChanger("bass-clef", true);
					disabler("bass-clef", true);
					break;
				case "Piano": case "Percussion":
					checkChanger("bass-clef", false);
					disabler("bass-clef", false);
					break;
			}
		}

		function refreshSongbook(someAbc) {
			const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(someAbc);
			const selectTune = document.getElementById("tune-selector");
			selectTune.innerHTML = "";
			abc.length = 0;
			for (let i = 0; i < tuneBook.tunes.length; i++) {
				const option = document.createElement("option");
				option.textContent = tuneBook.tunes[i].title;
				option.value = i;
				abc.push(tuneBook.tunes[i].abc);
				selectTune.appendChild(option);
			}
			selectTune.selectedIndex = 0;   // deterministic: start at the first tune (no random)
			currentTune = 0;
		}

		function refreshCollection() {
			const collection = document.getElementById("collection-selector").value;
			refreshSongbook(tunesObject[collection]);
			pickTune();
		}

		function load() {
			const selectCollection = document.getElementById("collection-selector");
			for (const key in tunesObject) {
				const option = document.createElement("option");
				option.textContent = key;
				option.value = key;
				selectCollection.appendChild(option);
			}

			// restore the last-viewed tune (so we return where we left off, same key)
			let saved = null; try { saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("tunesLast")); } catch (e) {}
			if (saved && tunesObject[saved.c]) selectCollection.value = saved.c;
			refreshSongbook(tunesObject[selectCollection.value]);
			if (saved) {
				const ts = document.getElementById("tune-selector");
				if (saved.i != null && saved.i < ts.options.length) { ts.selectedIndex = saved.i; currentTune = saved.i; }
				if (saved.t != null) document.getElementById("vis-transpose").value = saved.t;
			}

			const selectMelInst = document.getElementById("mel-instrument");
			for (let i = 0; i < midiInstruments.length; i++) {
				const option = document.createElement("option");
				option.textContent = midiInstruments[i];
				option.value = i;
				selectMelInst.appendChild(option);
			}

			document.querySelector(".next").addEventListener("click", next);
			document.querySelector(".warp").addEventListener("click", warp);
			document.querySelector(".seek").addEventListener("click", seek);
			document.querySelector(".seek2").addEventListener("click", seek2);
			document.querySelector("#seek-units").addEventListener("change", seekExplanation);

			showOptions();

			if (ABCJS.synth.supportsAudio()) {
				synthControl = new ABCJS.synth.SynthController();
				synthControl.load("#audio", cursorControl, {
					displayLoop: true, displayRestart: true,
					displayPlay: true, displayProgress: true, displayWarp: true
				});
			} else {
				document.querySelector("#audio").innerHTML =
					"<div class='audio-error'>Audio is not supported in this browser.</div>";
			}

			setTune(false);
		}

		// The tunes app steers the shared tonality: publish the SOUNDING key
		// (written K: shifted by the current transpose) — DO from the key signature
		// + resting tone from the mode — and reflect it in the Key dropdown.
		function publishTonality() {
			if (typeof Tonality === "undefined" || !abc[currentTune]) return;
			const m = /^K:\s*(.+)$/m.exec(abc[currentTune]);
			const t = m && Tonality.keyToTonality(m[1]);
			if (!t) return;
			const shift = (((parseInt(document.getElementById("vis-transpose").value) || 0) % 12) + 12) % 12;
			const doPc = (t.do + shift) % 12, restPc = (t.resting + shift) % 12;
			Tonality.setAll(doPc, restPc, t.mode, "tunes");
			try { localStorage.setItem("tuneTonality", JSON.stringify({ do: doPc, resting: restPc, mode: t.mode })); } catch (e) {}
			const ks = document.getElementById("key-select"); if (ks) ks.value = String(restPc);  // dropdown = tonal center
		}

		// Picking a key transposes the current tune so its tonal center (resting
		// tone) becomes the chosen pitch — e.g. a G-minor tune → "D" = D minor.
		function onKeySelect() {
			if (typeof Tonality === "undefined" || !abc[currentTune]) return;
			const m = /^K:\s*(.+)$/m.exec(abc[currentTune]);
			const t = m && Tonality.keyToTonality(m[1]); if (!t) return;
			const target = parseInt(document.getElementById("key-select").value);
			let semis = (((target - t.resting) % 12) + 12) % 12; if (semis > 6) semis -= 12;
			document.getElementById("vis-transpose").value = String(semis);
			setTune(true);
		}

		function saveTunesState() {
			try { localStorage.setItem("tunesLast", JSON.stringify({
				c: document.getElementById("collection-selector").value,
				i: currentTune,
				t: document.getElementById("vis-transpose").value
			})); } catch (e) {}
		}

		// Publish this tune's chord progression (transposed to the sounding key,
		// deduped consecutively) so the chord-sheet builder can autopopulate.
		function publishChords() {
			if (!abc[currentTune]) return;
			const shift = (((parseInt(document.getElementById("vis-transpose").value) || 0) % 12) + 12) % 12;
			const PC = { C:0, D:2, E:4, F:5, G:7, A:9, B:11 };
			const names = []; let re = /"([^"]+)"/g, m;
			while ((m = re.exec(abc[currentTune]))) {
				const raw = m[1]; const mm = /^([A-G])([#b]?)(.*)$/.exec(raw); if (!mm) continue;
				const pc = ((PC[mm[1]] + (mm[2] === "#" ? 1 : mm[2] === "b" ? -1 : 0) + shift) % 12 + 12) % 12;
				const root = (window.Tonality && Tonality.spellPc) ? Tonality.spellPc(pc)
					: ["C","C#","D","D#","E","F","F#","G","G#","A","A#","B"][pc];
				const name = root + mm[3];
				if (names.indexOf(name) === -1) names.push(name);   // each chord once (unique, first-seen order)
			}
			try { localStorage.setItem("tuneChords", JSON.stringify(names)); } catch (e) {}
		}

		function setTune(userAction) {
			publishTonality();
			publishChords();
			saveTunesState();
			const instAdjust = instrumentTranspositions[document.getElementById("inst-select").value];
			let visualTransposeHalfSteps = parseInt(document.getElementById("vis-transpose").value);
			visualTransposeHalfSteps += parseInt(document.getElementById("vis-octaves").value) * 12;
			visualTransposeHalfSteps += instAdjust;

			const inst = parseInt(document.getElementById("mel-instrument").value);
			let abcString = abc[currentTune].split("\n");
			if (document.getElementById("bass-clef").checked) {
				abcString[0] += "\nK: clef=bass";
				visualTransposeHalfSteps -= 12;
			}
			abcString[0] += `\n%%MIDI program ${inst} `;
			abcString = abcString.join("\n");

			const playChords = document.getElementById("play-chords").checked;
			const playTune   = document.getElementById("play-tune").checked;

			const abcOptions = {
				add_classes: true,
				clickListener: clickListener,
				responsive: "resize",
				visualTranspose: visualTransposeHalfSteps
			};

			const seekControls = document.querySelector(".seek-controls");
			seekControls.classList.add("disabled");
			synthControl.disable(true);

			const visualObj = ABCJS.renderAbc("paper", abcString, abcOptions)[0];
			document.querySelector(".midi").innerHTML = ABCJS.synth.getMidiFile(abc[currentTune]);

			let midiTransposeHalfSteps = visualTransposeHalfSteps +
				parseInt(document.getElementById("midi-transpose").value);
			if (instAdjust % 12 !== 0) midiTransposeHalfSteps -= instAdjust;

			const synthOpts = {
				midiTranspose: midiTransposeHalfSteps,
				chordsOff: !playChords,
				voicesOff: !playTune
			};

			getSoundfontUrl().then(function(sfUrl) {
				return new ABCJS.synth.CreateSynth().init({
					visualObj: visualObj,
					options: { soundFontUrl: sfUrl }
				});
			}).then(function() {
				if (synthControl) {
					synthControl.setTune(visualObj, userAction, synthOpts).then(function() {
						seekControls.classList.remove("disabled");
						seekExplanation();
					}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
				}
			}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
		}

		function next() {
			currentTune = (parseInt(currentTune) + 1) % abc.length;
			document.getElementById("tune-selector").value = currentTune;
			setTune(true);
		}

		function pickTune() {
			currentTune = parseInt(document.getElementById("tune-selector").value);
			setTune(true);
		}
	</script>

<div id="tunes-root">
	<div class="container">
		<main>
			<button class="download" style="display: none;">Download</button>
			<div class="seek-controls disabled">
				<label>Seek: <input type="number" min="0" id="seek-amount"></label>
				<select aria-label="seek units" id="seek-units">
					<option value="percent">Percent</option>
					<option value="seconds">Seconds</option>
					<option value="beats">Beats</option>
				</select>
				<button class="seek2">Seek</button>
				<span id="unit-explanation" class="click-explanation">First start playing to load audio before seeking.</span>
			</div>
			<div class="midi">MIDI</div>
			<div id="paper"></div>
			<div id="audio"></div>
			<button class="next">Next Tune</button>
			<br>
			<div class="inflow">
				<div class="positioner">
					<div class="fixed">
						<div id="the-top" class="options">
							<div class="buddy">
								<select id="collection-selector" onchange="refreshCollection()"></select>
								<select id="tune-selector" onchange="pickTune()"></select>
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="inst-select">Instrument:</label>
								<select id="inst-select" onchange="clefHandler(); pickTune()">
									<option value="Piano">Piano</option>
									<option value="Flute">Flute</option>
									<option value="Clarinet">Clarinet</option>
									<option value="Alto Sax">Alto Sax</option>
									<option value="Trumpet">Trumpet</option>
									<option value="Trombone">Trombone</option>
									<option value="Tuba">Tuba</option>
									<option value="Percussion">Percussion</option>
								</select>
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="show-options">Show options?</label>
								<input type="checkbox" id="show-options" class="checkbox" onchange="showOptions()">
							</div>
						</div>
						<div id="the-bottom" class="options">
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="mel-instrument">Playback instrument:</label>
								<select id="mel-instrument" onchange="pickTune()"></select>
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="key-select" class="number-input-label">Key:</label>
								<select id="key-select" onchange="onKeySelect()">
									<option value="0">C</option><option value="1">Db</option><option value="2">D</option>
									<option value="3">Eb</option><option value="4">E</option><option value="5">F</option>
									<option value="6">Gb</option><option value="7">G</option><option value="8">Ab</option>
									<option value="9">A</option><option value="10">Bb</option><option value="11">B</option>
								</select>
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="vis-transpose" class="number-input-label">Semitones:</label>
								<input id="vis-transpose" class="number-input" value="0" type="number" min="-12" max="12" oninput="pickTune()">
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="midi-transpose" class="number-input-label midi-transpose">Further midi transposition:</label>
								<input id="midi-transpose" class="number-input midi-transpose" value="0" type="number" min="-12" max="12" oninput="pickTune()">
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="vis-octaves" class="number-input-label">Octaves:</label>
								<input id="vis-octaves" class="number-input" value="0" type="number" min="-2" max="2" oninput="pickTune()">
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="play-chords">Play chords?</label>
								<input type="checkbox" id="play-chords" class="checkbox" checked onchange="pickTune()">
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="play-tune">Play tune?</label>
								<input type="checkbox" id="play-tune" class="checkbox" checked onchange="pickTune()">
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="bass-clef">Bass clef?</label>
								<input type="checkbox" id="bass-clef" class="checkbox" onchange="pickTune()">
							</div>
							<div class="buddy">
								<label for="show-cursor">Show cursor?</label>
								<input type="checkbox" id="show-cursor" class="checkbox" checked onchange="showCursor()">
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="tuneButtons">
				<button class="warp">Rand. Warp</button>
				<button class="seek">Seek to Middle</button>
			</div>
			<p class="beat"></p>
			<p class="click-explanation" style="display:none;">Click on a note to play that note.</p>
			<pre class="clicked-info"></pre>
			<pre class="feedback"></pre>
		</main>
	</div>
	<script src="/apps/shared/soundfont.js"></script>
	<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
	<script src="/apps/tunes/tunes-object.js"></script>
	<script src="/apps/shared/cursor-synth.js"></script>
	<script src="/apps/shared/tonality.js?v=4"></script>
	<script src="/apps/shared/audio.js?v=3"></script>
	<script src="/apps/shared/establish-button.js"></script>
	<script>
		const cursorControl = new CursorControl();
		load();
	</script>
</div>
<script src="/apps/shared/space-play.js"></script>
```
